name: Fred Armisen
blurb: An SNL chameleon who later co-created Portlandia.
bio: Fred Armisen is an American comedian, actor, and musician who was a Saturday Night Live cast member from 2002 to 2013, known for a wide range of impressions and recurring characters. He went on to co-create and star in the sketch series Portlandia with Carrie Brownstein.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
